evals.name: detect-hooks-go
evals.prompt: I'm about to start working on /home/cybot/projects/ofelia/main/ — what git hooks does this project use and are they set up?
evals.expected_output: Should detect lefthook.yml and explain how to install (make setup or lefthook install)

evals.name: detect-hooks-missing
evals.prompt: I'm starting work on /home/cybot/projects/assetpicker/main/ — are git hooks configured?
evals.expected_output: Should detect NO hook framework and suggest adding one
